name: ADVANCED MICRO DEVICES INC
business: AMD sells high-performance and AI computing solutions including CPUs, GPUs, FPGAs, adaptive SoCs, AI accelerators, networking products, and software. It serves data centers, client computing, gaming, and embedded markets. Customers include hyperscale data centers, OEMs, ODMs, system integrators, and distributors.

exposures.sentence: For data centers, we offer AI accelerators, microprocessors (CPUs), graphic processing units (GPUs), data processing units (DPUs), AI Network Interface Cards (AI NICs) and field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs).

For data centers, we offer AI accelerators, microprocessors (CPUs), graphic processing units (GPUs), data processing units (DPUs), AI Network Interface Cards (AI NICs) and field programmable gate arrays (FPGAs).

Our embedded computing portfolio delivers high-performance, scalable solutions across CPUs, APUs, FPGAs, System-on-Modules (SOMs) and adaptive SoCs for markets such as automotive, industrial, healthcare, storage and networking with integrated AI processing capabilities.
AMD drives innovation in high performance and AI computing to solve the world s most important challenges.
Our GPUs, including discrete GPUs and semi-custom SoCs, are combined with software to power immersive gaming experiences across PCs, game consoles and cloud gaming services.
We offer ultra-low latency networking solutions.

Our products address computing needs in aerospace and defense, automotive, industrial, vision and healthcare, communications infrastructure, test and measurement, emulation and prototyping, audio, video and broadcasting, and data center.
Our embedded products address computing needs in...industrial...
The AMD Ryzen Embedded 9000 Series processors, offering performance-per-watt and low latency for automation systems and machine vision applications.
AMD Ryzen PRO solutions deliver enterprise-class security, manageability, and reliability for commercial client PCs including business notebooks, desktops, and workstations.

Our embedded computing portfolio delivers high-performance, scalable solutions across CPUs, APUs, FPGAs, System-on-Modules (SOMs) and adaptive SoCs for markets such as automotive, industrial, healthcare, storage and networking with integrated AI processing capabilities.

catalysts.event: Acquisition of ZT Group Int’l, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: In March 2025, we acquired ZT Group Int’l, Inc. (ZT Systems)

catalysts.event: Sale of ZT manufacturing business to Sanmina
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we sold the ZT data center infrastructure manufacturing business (ZT Manufacturing Business) to Sanmina Corporation

In October 2025, we entered into a product purchase agreement with OpenAI OpCo, LLC, (OpenAI) to deploy 6 gigawatts of AMD GPUs, with the deployment of the first gigawatt of capacity powered by our AMD Instinct MI450 series products.
In January 2026, we announced the Ryzen 7 9850X3D, in addition to our Ryzen 7 9800X3D series.

catalysts.event: Launch of Ryzen AI 400 series processors
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we launched our Ryzen AI 400 series processors

catalysts.event: Introduction of Ryzen AI Embedded series processors
catalysts.sentence: In January 2026, we introduced a new family of Ryzen AI Embedded series processors
